zh.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara於1188年出生。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1238年享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara于1188年出生。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1238年享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Da
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 達, said to be derived from the personal name Shu Da (叔達), a talent during the reign of the legendary king Zhuanxu (traditional dates: 2514–2437  BC ); or adopted as a Han surname by other minority ethnic groups.
Mandarin form of the surname 笪, a surname originating in ancient Jianzhou (located in present-day Fujian province) and Jurong (located in Jiangsu province) or a surname from the Hui ethnic group.

nameMeanings.name: Carrara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Guido, Angelo, Alessandro, Amerigo, Antonio, Arrigo, Carlo, Enzo, Gaetano, Giovanni, Guerino.
Italian (southern): habitational name from any of various places called Carrara, from Latin carraria ‘quarry’.

nameMeanings.name: Albertino
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara was born in 1188. He had at least 1 son. He died in 1238, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara est né en 1188. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1238, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara wurde 1188 geboren. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1238 im Alter von 50 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara è nato il nel 1188. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1238, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carraraは1188年に生まれた。彼は少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼は1238年に50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara(은)는 1188년 태어났다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1238년 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara nasceu em 1188. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1238, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara родился в 1188 г. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1238 г. в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Albertino Da Carrara nació en 1188. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1238, a la edad de 50 años.

th.1238–Male: ปี1238–ถึงแก่กรรม
